disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe cramping lower-abdominal and pelvic pain that has escalated over 12 hours, unrelieved by a heat pad and repeated over-the-counter ibuprofen.
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and how bad is it?
What has the pain been like over the last several hours?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's low down across my whole lower belly and pubic area, both sides, and it's gone from bad period pain to tearing agony over about 12 hours. The heat pad and all the ibuprofen have done nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent nausea with repeated vomiting accompanying the pain.
trigger_question_examples: Have you been sick or vomiting?
How is your stomach — any nausea?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep feeling sick and I've been vomiting over and over.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute panic with hyperventilation, a pounding racing heart and sweating.
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Is your breathing or heart doing anything unusual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm panicking, my heart is pounding and racing, I'm breathing really fast and I can't seem to catch my breath, and I'm all sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has taken a large amount of over-the-counter ibuprofen over several hours with no relief.
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain, and how much?
What painkillers have you used tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken a lot of ibuprofen over the last several hours — several tablets — and it hasn't touched it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Strong mistrust of local obstetric/gynaecology services and a firm refusal to attend the local emergency department, driven by past experiences of feeling dismissed and dehumanised.
trigger_question_examples: How have past visits to doctors or hospitals gone for you?
How do you feel about being seen in person or going to hospital?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I've dealt with those services I've been made to feel like nothing, like I don't get a say over my own body. I will not go to that hospital tonight — I'd rather stay here in pain.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: Please don't tell me I have to go to the ED or that this is all in my head. I can't face being forced into that again.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain came on around the start of menstruation; last menstrual period and pregnancy status are uncertain and not volunteered.
trigger_question_examples: When was your last period, and could you be pregnant?
Is there any chance of pregnancy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started around when my period was due. I honestly haven't been tracking things, and I suppose there could be a chance I'm pregnant — I hadn't thought about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no heavy vaginal bleeding, no fainting; the pain is diffuse and cramping across both lower quadrants rather than sudden, sharp and localised to one side.
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever, or any heavy vaginal bleeding?
Have you fainted, and is the pain stuck sharply to one side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I know of, no heavy bleeding, and I haven't fainted. The pain is everywhere low down and cramping, not just one sharp spot — but it's unbearable.

deflection_behaviours.description: Resists any suggestion of attending the emergency department or of an in-person examination, because of past experiences of dismissal and fear of coercion.
deflection_behaviours.trigger_condition: When escalation to the ED, an in-person assessment, or an examination is raised.
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: I already told you I won't go to that hospital. They never listen and they don't respect what I want. Can't you just help me get through tonight here?

deflection_behaviours.description: Becomes distressed and hypervigilant if the presentation is framed as purely stress or anxiety, feeling her physical pain is being dismissed.
deflection_behaviours.trigger_condition: Any time the clinician appears to attribute the pain to stress, anxiety or emotional causes.
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: Please don't say this is just stress. Something is really wrong with my body — I'm not imagining this.
